member.name: M:CometEditor::AssetDataBase::SetDirty(Resource)
member.summary: Call it when changing a Resource and you do not want to lose the changes
member.param: The resource where changes don't want to be lost.

member.name: M:CometEditor::AssetDataBase::SetDirty(SubResource)
member.summary: Call it when changing a SubResource and you do not want to lose the changes
member.param: The sub resource where changes don't want to be lost.

member.name: T:CometEditor::EditorBehaviour
member.summary: Base class for editor behaviours. Editor behaviours are scripts that are executed within the editor environment.

member.name: T:CometEditor::EditorWindow
member.summary: Base class for editor windows. Editor windows are scripts that controls the behaviour of a window inside the editor environment.

member.name: M:CometEditor::EditorWindow::Focus()
member.summary: Focus this window.

member.name: M:CometEditor::EditorWindow::Close()
member.summary: Closes this window. This will destroy the window instance and remove it from the editor environment. If you want to hide the window without destroying it, you can use the Hide method.

member.name: M:CometEditor::EditorWindow::Hide()
member.summary: Hides this window. This will hide the window from the editor environment, but it will not destroy the window instance. You can use the Show method to show the window again.

member.name: M:CometEditor::EditorWindow::Show()
member.summary: Shows this window. If the window is already visible, it will be focused instead.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::isFocused
member.summary: Checks if this window is currently focused.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::isHovered
member.summary: Checks if this window is currently hovered.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::isVisible
member.summary: Checks if this window is currently visible. It also returns true if the window is collapsed or if it is in a tab bar but not the active one, as long as it is not closed. If you want to check if the window body is visible, you can use the IsBodyVisible method instead.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::isHidden
member.summary: Checks if this window is currently hidden.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::isBodyVisible
member.summary: Checks if this window body is currently visible. A window body is visible if the window is not collapsed or it is the currently active window in a tab bar.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::isDocked
member.summary: Checks if this window is currently docked in the editor environment.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::dockable
member.summary: Flag that indicates if the window is dockable or not.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::hasUnsavedChanges
member.summary: Flag that indicates if the window has unsaved changes or not. If the window has unsaved changes and it is going to be closed, a confirmation popup will be shown to the user.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::saveChangesMessage
member.summary: The message to show in the confirmation popup when the window has unsaved changes and it is going to be closed. If this message is empty, a default message will be shown instead.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::resizable
member.summary: Flag that indicates if the window is resizable or not. This flag will be ignored if the window is dockable.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::isPopup
member.summary: Flag that indicates if the window is a popup or not.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::hasMenuBar
member.summary: Flag that indicates if the window has a menu bar or not.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::canShowScrollbar
member.summary: Flag that indicates if the window can show the scrollbar or not.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::allowHorizontalScrollbar
member.summary: Flag that indicates if the window can show the horizontal scrollbar or not. This flag will be ignored if canShowScrollbar is false.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::canScrollWithMouse
member.summary: Flag that indicates if the window can scroll with mouse or not.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::canCollapse
member.summary: Flag that indicates if the window can collapse or not. If set to false, it will be ignored if the window is a popup or is docked.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::hasCloseButton
member.summary: Flag that indicates if the window has a close button or not.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::hasTitleBar
member.summary: Flag that indicates if the window has a title bar or not.

member.name: P:CometEditor::EditorWindow::icon
member.summary: The string used for the icon. It should be from CometEditor::RawIcon.

member.name: M:CometEditor::EditorWindow::CreateOrShow(string,string)
member.summary: Creates or shows an editor window. If a window with the same title already exists, it will be focused instead of creating a new one.
member.param: The class name of the window to show. This class must inherit from EditorWindow.
The title of the window. If title is empty, it will be the class name instead.
member.returns: Returns the window instance.

member.name: M:CometEditor::EditorWindow::Get(string)
member.summary: Gets an editor window by its title.
member.param: The title of the window to get.
member.returns: Returns the window instance if found, null otherwise.

member.name: M:CometEditor::GUI::ShowSprite(Sprite,Vector2,bool,bool,bool)
member.summary: Shows an sprite in the inspector. Call it inside the OnCustomInspector method of an inspector override.
member.param: The sprite to show.
The size of the image to show.
Whether to keep the aspect ratio of the image. If true, the size parameter will be used as the maximum size of the image.
Whether to flip the image horizontally.
Whether to flip the image vertically.

member.name: M:CometEditor::GUI::ShowTexture(Texture,Vector2,bool,bool,bool)
member.summary: Shows a texture in the inspector. Call it inside the OnCustomInspector method of an inspector override.
member.param: The texture to show.
The size of the image to show.
Whether to keep the aspect ratio of the image. If true, the size parameter will be used as the maximum size of the image.
Whether to flip the image horizontally.
Whether to flip the image vertically.

member.summary: Cancels all scheduled invocations on this behaviour.

member.summary: Invokes the specified method after the given time delay.

The delay in seconds before invoking the method.

member.summary: Invokes the specified method after the given time delay and then repeatedly at the specified repeat rate.
member.param: The name of the method to invoke.
The delay in seconds before the first invocation of the method.
The rate in seconds at which to repeatedly invoke the method.

member.summary: Checks if the specified method is currently scheduled for invocation.

member.name: M:CometEngine::CometBehaviour::IsAnyInvoking()
member.summary: Checks if any method is currently scheduled for invocation on this behaviour.

member.name: T:CometEngine::AudioListener
member.summary: The Audio Listener is the point in space where the audio is heard from. Usually, it is attached to the main camera.

member.name: T:CometEngine::AudioSource
member.summary: The Audio Source plays back an audio sample in the scene. It can be 2D or 3D.

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::audioSample
member.summary: The audio sample to play

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::outputAudioMixerGroup
member.summary: The audio mixer group

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::isPlaying
member.summary: Is the audio source playing the audio sample?

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::isPaused
member.summary: Is the audio source paused when playing the audio sample?

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::isFinished
member.summary: Has the audio sample finished playing?

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::loop
member.summary: Should the audio sample loop when finished?

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::maxDistance
member.summary: For 3D sounds, distance at which sound is inaudible

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::minDistance
member.summary: For 3D sounds, distance where volume is at its maximum

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::mute
member.summary: Should the audio sample be muted?

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::ignoreEffects
member.summary: Ignore audio effect behaviours from the audio source

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::ignoreListenerEffects
member.summary: Ignore audio effect behaviours from the audio listener

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::pan
member.summary: The pan of the sound. Takes a value between -1 and 1, 0 is center

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::pitch
member.summary: The playback speed (frequency) of the sound

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::playOnEnable
member.summary: Should the audio sample be played when audio source is set enabled?

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::volume
member.summary: Volume of the audio to play

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::mode
member.summary: Play mode of the audio

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioSource::timePosition
member.summary: Get/Set the current time position in miliseconds of the sound

member.name: M:CometEngine::AudioSource::Play()
member.summary: Play the audio sample

member.name: M:CometEngine::AudioSource::Pause()
member.summary: Pause the audio sample

member.name: M:CometEngine::AudioSource::Resume()
member.summary: Resume the audio sample

member.name: M:CometEngine::AudioSource::Stop()
member.summary: Stop the audio sample

member.name: M:CometEngine::AudioSource::PlayOnce(AudioSample)
member.summary: Play an audio sample applying the configuration of the audioSoruce
member.param: The audio sample to play

member.name: M:CometEngine::AudioSource::PlaySingle(AudioSample,float)
member.summary: Play a single audioSample 2D
member.param: The audio sample to play
Volume of the audio sample

member.name: M:CometEngine::AudioSource::PlaySingleAtPosition(AudioSample,Vector3,float)
member.summary: Play a single audioSample 3D
member.param: The audio sample to play
Position in world space to play the audio sample
Volume of the audio sample

member.name: M:CometEngine::AudioSource::PlaySingleTracked(AudioSample,float)
member.summary: Play a single audioSample 2D and returns the AudioSource that is destroyed once the audio is finished
member.param: The audio sample to play
Volume of the audio sample

member.name: M:CometEngine::AudioSource::PlaySingleAtPositionTracked(AudioSample,Vector3,float)
member.summary: Play a single audioSample 3D and returns the AudioSource that is destroyed once the audio is finished
member.param: The audio sample to play
Position in world space to play the audio sample
Volume of the audio sample

member.name: T:CometEngine::AudioEffect
member.summary: Base class for every Audio Effect Behaviour.

member.name: T:CometEngine::AudioEffectDistortion
member.summary: An audio distortion effect. It distorts the incoming audio signal.

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioEffectDistortion::level
member.summary: Percentage of distortion intensity

member.name: T:CometEngine::AudioEffectEcho
member.summary: An audio echo effect. It adds an echo to the incoming audio signal.

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioEffectEcho::delay
member.summary: Delay of the echo sound in milliseconds

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioEffectEcho::filter
member.summary: Amount of low-pass filtering applied to the echo signal. Range between 0.0F (no filtering, brighter) to 1.0F (fully filtered, muffled).

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioEffectEcho::feedback
member.summary: Percentage of output fed back into input

member.name: T:CometEngine::AudioEffectFlange
member.summary: An audio flange effect. It creates a whooshing or sweeping sound by mixing two identical signals together, with one signal delayed by a small and gradually changing period.

member.name: P:CometEngine::AudioEffectFlange::depth
member.summary: Percentage by which the delay time is modulated by the low-frequency oscillator, in hundredths of a percentage point

member.name: T:CometEngine::AudioEffectReverb
member.summary: An audio reverb effect. It simulates the reverberation of sound in a physical space.

member.name: T:CometEngine::Camera
member.summary: The Camera is the point of view where the scene is rendered from.

member.name: P:CometEngine::Camera::aspectRatio
member.summary: Camera width / Camera height

member.name: P:CometEngine::Camera::backgroundColor
member.summary: Background clear color

member.name: P:CometEngine::Camera::cullingMask
member.summary: Mask to select which entitys renders

member.name: P:CometEngine::Camera::farPlane
member.summary: The distance of the far clipping plane from the Camera

member.name: P:CometEngine::Camera::nearPlane
member.summary: The distance of the near clipping plane from the the Camera

member.name: P:CometEngine::Camera::size
member.summary: The size of the camera

member.name: P:CometEngine::Camera::depth
member.summary: The depth of the camera to know which camera renders on top of the others

member.name: P:CometEngine::Camera::worldSize
member.summary: The width and height of the camera in world space units

member.name: P:CometEngine::Camera::worldMin
member.summary: The minimum point of the camera in world space units

member.name: P:CometEngine::Camera::worldMax
member.summary: The maximum point of the camera in world space units

member.name: M:CometEngine::Camera::ScreenToWorldPoint(Vector2)
member.summary: Transform a screen point to world space point
member.param: The screen point in pixels

member.name: M:CometEngine::Camera::WorldToScreenPoint(Vector2)
member.summary: Transform a world point to screen point
member.param: The world point in world space units

member.summary: The texture where this camera renders to

member.name: M:CometEngine::Camera::GetAllCameras()
member.summary: Array of all cameras

member.name: T:CometEngine::BezierCurve
member.summary: Behaviour that holds a bezier curve to be used by other behaviours.

member.name: P:CometEngine::BezierCurve::curve
member.summary: The curve that this behaviour is using.

member.name: M:CometEngine::BezierCurve::GetPositionAtCurveDistance(float,bool)
member.summary: Gets the curve global position at the given curve distance.
member.param: The distance of the curve to get the point.
Flag that indicates if it has to be calculated as a cubic or lineal.
member.returns: Returns the curve point.

member.name: M:CometEngine::BezierCurve::GetPositionAtCurveNormalizedDistance(float,bool)
member.summary: Gets the curve global position at the given curve normalized distance.
member.param: The normalized distance (0.0F - 1.0F) of the curve to get the point.
Flag that indicates if it has to be calculated as a cubic or lineal.
member.returns: Returns the curve point.

member.name: T:CometEngine::BezierCurveFollower
member.summary: Behaviour that moves a transform along a bezier curve.

member.name: M:CometEngine::BezierCurveFollower::MoveAt(float,Transform)
member.summary: Moves the given transform to the location at the given curve value point.
member.param: The curve distance to move to.
The transform to move.

member.name: M:CometEngine::BezierCurveFollower::MoveAtNormalized(float,Transform)
member.summary: Moves the given transform to the location at the given curve normalized value point.
member.param: The curve normalized distance to move to.
The transform to move.

member.name: P:CometEngine::BezierCurveFollower::positionOffset
member.summary: The position offset to apply when moving a transform.

member.name: P:CometEngine::BezierCurveFollower::rotationOffset
member.summary: The rotation offset to apply when moving a transform.

member.name: P:CometEngine::BezierCurveFollower::applyRotation
member.summary: Flag that indicates if rotation should be applied.

member.name: P:CometEngine::BezierCurveFollower::cubicInterpolation
member.summary: Flag that indicates if a cubic interpolation should be applied instead of a lineal.

member.name: P:CometEngine::BezierCurveFollower::loop
member.summary: Flag that indicates if loop should be applied.

member.name: P:CometEngine::BezierCurveFollower::lookAhead
member.summary: Distance to look ahead in order to calculate the rotation.

member.name: P:CometEngine::BezierCurveFollower::curveToFollow
member.summary: The bezier curve that will follow.

member.name: T:CometEngine::BaseLight
member.summary: Base class for all lights

member.name: P:CometEngine::BaseLight::color
member.summary: The color of the light

member.summary: The Intensity of a light is multiplied with the Light color

member.name: P:CometEngine::BaseLight::sortingLayers
member.summary: Array of all sorting layers this light affects

member.summary: Sets the sorting layers this light affects
member.param: Array of sorting layers names

member.name: T:CometEngine::FreeformLight
member.summary: A freeform light is a light that has a custom shape.

member.name: T:CometEngine::GlobalLight
member.summary: A global light affects all objects in the scene equally, regardless of their position or orientation. It is often used to simulate ambient lighting or environmental effects.

member.name: T:CometEngine::ParametricLight
member.summary: A parametric light is a light that has a regular polygon shape. The shape is defined by the number of sides and the radius.

member.name: P:CometEngine::ParametricLight::sides
member.summary: Number of sides of the polygon shape. Minimum is 3. Higher values approximate a circle.

member.name: P:CometEngine::ParametricLight::radius
member.summary: Radius of the polygon shape.

member.name: T:CometEngine::PointLight
member.summary: A point light is a light that emits light in all directions from a single point in space. It is often used to simulate light sources such as light bulbs or candles.

member.name: T:CometEngine::SpriteLight
member.summary: A sprite light is a light that uses a sprite as its shape. The sprite's alpha channel is used to define the light's shape.

member.name: P:CometEngine::SpriteLight::sprite
member.summary: The sprite to render as a light

The point in world space where the force is applied

The point in world space where the impulse is applied

member.param: The impulse to apply

member.name: M:CometEngine::RigidBody::ApplyTorque(float)
member.summary: Apply a torque. This affects the angular velocity without affecting the linear velocity of the center of mass

member.name: T:CometEngine::AnchoredJoint

member.name: T:CometEngine::DistanceJoint
member.summary: A distance joint is a joint that maintains a fixed distance between two anchor points on two rigidbodies. It is often used to create spring-like effects or to limit the movement of objects relative to each other.

member.summary: Should the distance be calculated automatically?

member.name: P:CometEngine::DistanceJoint::distance
member.summary: The distance separating the two ends of the joint

member.name: P:CometEngine::DistanceJoint::maxDistanceFixed
member.summary: Should the minimum distance be the max distance?

member.name: T:CometEngine::FixedJoint
member.summary: A fixed joint is a joint that locks two rigidbodies together, preventing any relative movement between them. It is often used to create rigid connections between objects, such as attaching a weapon to a character or fixing an object to a surface.

member.summary: The frequency at which the linear spring oscillates (in Hertz)

member.summary: The frequency at which the angular spring oscillates (in Hertz)

member.summary: The angular damping ratio (0 = no damping, 1 = critical damping)

member.summary: The angle referenced between the two bodies used as the constraint for the joint

member.name: T:CometEngine::FrictionJoint

member.summary: The maximum force that can be generated when trying to maintain the friction joint constraint

member.summary: The maximum torque that can be generated when trying to maintain the friction joint constraint

member.name: M:CometEngine::Cursor::SetCursor(Texture2D,Vector2i)
member.summary: Sets the current cursor.
member.param: The texture to use as cursor. If null, the default system cursor will be used.
The hotspot of the cursor, in pixels. The hotspot is the point within the cursor that will be used for clicking. (0,0) is the top-left corner of the texture.

member.name: M:CometEngine::Physics::RaycastClosest(Vector2,Vector2,float,int,float,float)
member.summary: Casts a ray against Colliders in the Scene and returns the closest. If there is not hit, raycasthit.collider will be null
member.param: The starting point of the ray in world coordinates.
The direction of the ray.
The max distance the ray should check for collisions.
A bitmask that is used to filter which layers the raycast will interact with.
The minimum depth of the objects the raycast will hit.
The maximum depth of the objects the raycast will hit.
member.returns: The RaycastHit of the closest hit or null if no hits

member.name: M:CometEngine::Physics::RaycastAny(Vector2,Vector2,float,int,float,float)
member.summary: Casts a ray against Colliders in the Scene and returns the first one. If there is not hit, raycasthit.collider will be null
member.param: The starting point of the ray in world coordinates.
The direction of the ray.
The max distance the ray should check for collisions.
A bitmask that is used to filter which layers the raycast will interact with.
The minimum depth of the objects the raycast will hit.
The maximum depth of the objects the raycast will hit.
member.returns: The RaycastHit of the first hit or null if no hits

member.name: M:CometEngine::Physics::Raycast(Vector2,Vector2,float,int,float,float)
member.summary: Casts a ray against Colliders in the Scene and returns an array of all hits
member.param: The starting point of the ray in world coordinates.
The direction of the ray.
The max distance the ray should check for collisions.
A bitmask that is used to filter which layers the raycast will interact with.
The minimum depth of the objects the raycast will hit.
The maximum depth of the objects the raycast will hit.
member.returns: An array of RaycastHit of all hits, if no hits an empty array

member.name: M:CometEngine::Physics::QueryAABB(Vector2,Vector2,int,float,float)
member.summary: Query an AABB and return an array of all colliders touching
member.param: The center of the AABB in world coordinates.
The size of the AABB.
A bitmask that is used to filter which layers the query will interact with.
The minimum depth of the objects the query will hit.
The maximum depth of the objects the query will hit.
member.returns: An array of all colliders touching the AABB, if no hits an empty array

member.name: M:CometEngine::Physics::ShouldCollide(Collider,Collider)
member.summary: Check if two colliders should collide according to their layers and the physics collision matrix
member.param: The first collider to check
The second collider to check
member.returns: True if the colliders should collide, false otherwise

member.name: M:CometEngine::RuntimeAssets::LoadResource(string,ResourceType)
member.summary: Loads a resource from the given path. The path is relative to the RuntimeAssets folder and file extension should not be included.
member.param: The path to the resource, relative to the RuntimeAssets folder, without file extension.
The type of resources to load. Use ResourceType::ALL to load the first matching resource without filtering by type.
member.returns: The loaded resource, or null if loading failed.

member.name: M:CometEngine::RuntimeAssets::LoadAllResources(string,ResourceType)
member.summary: Loads all the resources at the given path. The path is relative to the RuntimeAssets folder and file extension should not be included. If the path points to a file, it will return an array with a single resource. If the path points to a folder, it will return an array with all the resources in that folder and its subfolders.
member.param: The path to the folder or file, relative to the RuntimeAssets folder, without file extension.
The type of resources to load. Use ResourceType::ALL to load all types.
member.returns: An array of loaded resources, or an empty array if loading failed.

member.name: M:CometEngine::RuntimeAssets::LoadEntity(string)
member.summary: Loads an entity from the given path. The path is relative to the RuntimeAssets folder and file extension should not be included.
member.param: The path to the entity, relative to the RuntimeAssets folder, without file extension.
member.returns: The loaded entity, or null if loading failed.

member.name: M:CometEngine::RuntimeAssets::LoadAllEntities(string)
member.summary: Loads all the entities at the given path. The path is relative to the RuntimeAssets folder and file extension should not be included. If the path points to a file, it will return an array with a single entity. If the path points to a folder, it will return an array with all the entities in that folder and its subfolders.
member.param: The path to the folder or file, relative to the RuntimeAssets folder, without file extension.
member.returns: An array of loaded entities, or an empty array if loading failed.

member.name: M:CometEngine::RuntimeAssets::UnloadResource(Resource)
member.summary: Unloads a previously loaded resource.
member.param: The resource to unload.

member.name: M:CometEngine::RuntimeAssets::UnloadEntity(Entity)
member.summary: Unloads a previously loaded entity.
member.param: The entity to unload.

member.name: T:CometEngine::Ptr
member.summary: Base class CometEngine types. Used to manage references to native objects.

member.name: T:CometEngine::Resource
member.summary: Base class for all resources. A resource is a loadable asset such as a texture, a sound or a video.

member.name: T:CometEngine::SerializedReference
member.summary: Base class for all serialized reference types. A serialized reference is a reference that can be serialized and deserialized. It is used for example in the inspector to reference objects.

member.name: T:CometEngine::StrongReference
member.summary: Class that manages the life of a class object.

member.name: M:CometEngine::StrongReference::StrongReference()
member.summary: Creates a new strong reference that must be freed by the user calling FreeOwnership().

member.name: P:CometEngine::StrongReference::isOwnershipInternal
member.summary: Flag that indicates that the object is owned internally by the engine so it will be deleted automatically. False if the owner is the user, so it has the responsability to free it whenever using FreeOwnership().

member.name: M:CometEngine::StrongReference::FreeOwnership()
member.summary: Transfers the owner to the engine, so it will be deleted when no more engine internal classes are using it.

member.name: M:CometEngine::StrongReference::RequestOwnership()
member.summary: Transfers the owner to the user so the object will only be deleted when it is called FreeOwnership().
member.returns: Returns true if the ownership now does not belong to the engine internal. If it returns false it means that this object must be always managed internally.

member.name: T:CometEngine::SubResource
member.summary: Base class for all sub-resources. A sub resource is a loadable part of a main resource. Such as a sprite in a texture.

member.returns: A new CometObject that is a copy of the input object.

member.summary: Executes the node logic and returns the execution result with the output connection to continue the flow and the next node id to execute from the output pin.

member.returns: ExecutionResult with the output connection to continue the flow and the next node id to execute from the output pin. Empty to indicate more updates are needed for this node.

member.summary: Called when the execution of the node ends. Useful for nodes that needs to do some cleanup after the last execution.
member.param: The graph that this node belongs to.

member.summary: Default constructor. Useful when the nodes still needs more updates to decide the next output.

member.name: M:CometEngine::GraphNode::ExecutionResult::ExecutionResult(string,uint64)
member.summary: Constructor with the output connection to continue the flow and the next node id to execute from the output pin.
member.param: The name of the output pin from which the flow should continue.

The unique identifier of the next node to execute from the output pin. Useful for nodes with multiple output connections from the same pin. If it is 0, the next node will be the first one connected to the output pin.

member.name: F:CometEngine::GraphNode::ExecutionResult::outputConnection
member.summary: The name of the output pin from which the flow should continue.

member.name: F:CometEngine::GraphNode::ExecutionResult::nextNodeId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the next node to execute from the output pin. Useful for nodes with multiple output connections from the same pin. If it is 0, the next node will be the first one connected to the output pin.

member.name: T:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient
member.summary: Class that acts as a client for socket connections, allowing it to connect to a server and exchange data.

member.name: P:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::onConnected
member.summary: Event triggered when the client successfully connects to a server.

member.name: P:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::onDisconnected
member.summary: Event triggered when the client is disconnected from the server, either by calling Close() or due to a connection error.

member.name: P:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::onConnectionError
member.summary: Event triggered when the client can't connect to the server.

member.name: P:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::onNewData
member.summary: Event triggered when the client receives data from the server. Data can be retrieved using the Receive() method.

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::Connect(string,int)
member.summary: Connect to a remote server.
member.param: The hostname or IP address of the server
The port number to connect to
member.returns: True if connection was successful, false otherwise

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::Send(string)
member.summary: Send data to the server.
member.param: The data to send as a string
member.returns: Number of bytes sent, or -1 on error

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::Receive(int)
member.summary: Receive data from the server.
member.param: The maximum size of data to receive
member.returns: The received data as a string, or empty string on error

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::Close()
member.summary: Close the connection to the server.

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::GetStatus()
member.summary: Get the current connection status of the client.
member.returns: The connection status

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::HasDataToRead()
member.summary: Check if there is data available to read from the server.
member.returns: True if there is data to read, false otherwise

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::GetPort()
member.summary: Get the port of the server connected to.
member.returns: The port number, or 0 if not connected

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::GetHost()
member.summary: Get the host of the server connected to.
member.returns: The hostname or IP address, or empty string if not connected

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketClient::IsConnected()
member.summary: Check if the client is currently connected to the server.
member.returns: True if connected, false otherwise

member.name: T:CometEngine::Network::SocketServer
member.summary: Class that acts as a server for socket connections, allowing multiple clients to connect and exchange data.

member.name: P:CometEngine::Network::SocketServer::onClientConnected
member.summary: Event triggered when a client is connected to the server. The client ID can be retrieved from the event arguments.

member.name: P:CometEngine::Network::SocketServer::onClientDisconnected
member.summary: Event triggered when a client is disconnected from the server. The client ID can be retrieved from the event arguments.

member.name: P:CometEngine::Network::SocketServer::onClientNewData
member.summary: Event triggered when a client sends data to the server. The client ID can be retrieved from the event arguments.

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketServer::Listen(int)
member.summary: Start listening for incoming connections.
member.param: The port to listen on
member.returns: True if the server started successfully, false otherwise

member.summary: Send data to a specific client.
member.param: The unique ID of the client
The data to send as a string
member.returns: Number of bytes sent, or -1 on error

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketServer::Receive(uint64,int)
member.summary: Receive data from a specific client.
member.param: The unique ID of the client
The maximum size of data to receive
member.returns: The received data as a string, or empty string on error

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketServer::Broadcast(string)
member.summary: Broadcast data to all connected clients.
member.param: The data to send as a string

member.summary: Disconnect a client from the server.
member.param: The unique ID of the client to disconnect

member.summary: Close the server socket.

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketServer::HasDataToRead()
member.summary: Check if there is data available to read from any client.

member.name: M:CometEngine::Network::SocketServer::GetPort()
member.summary: Get the port the server is listening on.
member.returns: The port number

member.summary: Get the number of clients currently connected to the server.

member.returns: True if the client is connected, false otherwise

member.summary: Get all connected client IDs.
member.returns: An array containing all connected client IDs
